Class AbstractLoopContractRule

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractLoopContractRule
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
LoopContractExternalRule, LoopContractInternalRule
public abstract class AbstractLoopContractRule extends AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule

Rule for the application of LoopContracts.

See Also:

    • AbstractLoopContractRule

      public AbstractLoopContractRule()

  • Method Details

    • getApplicableContracts

      public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getApplicableContracts(AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation instantiation, Goal goal, Services services)
      Parameters:
      instantiation - an instantiation.
      goal - the current goal.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      all applicable loop contracts for the instantiation.

    • getApplicableContracts

      public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getApplicableContracts(SpecificationRepository specifications, JavaStatement statement, JModality.JavaModalityKind modalityKind, Goal goal)
      Parameters:
      specifications - a specification repository.
      statement - a statement.
      modalityKind - the current goal's modality.
      goal - the current goal.
      Returns:
      all applicable loop contracts for the block from the repository.

    • filterAppliedContracts

      protected ImmutableSet<LoopContract> filterAppliedContracts(ImmutableSet<LoopContract> collectedContracts, Goal goal)
      Parameters:
      collectedContracts - a set of loop contracts.
      goal - the current goal.
      Returns:
      the set with all non-applicable contracts filtered out.

    • contractApplied

      protected boolean contractApplied(LoopContract contract, Goal goal)
      Parameters:
      contract - a loop contract.
      goal - the current goal.
      Returns:
      true if the contract has already been applied.

    • isApplicable

      public boolean isApplicable(Goal goal, PosInOccurrence occurrence)
      Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
      Returning true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)

    • instantiate

      public AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation instantiate(JTerm formula, Goal goal)
      Parameters:
      formula - the formula on which the rule is to be applied.
      goal - the current goal.
      Returns:
      a new instantiation.

    • createAndRegisterAnonymisationVariables

      protected Map<LocationVariable, Function> createAndRegisterAnonymisationVariables(Iterable<LocationVariable> variables, LoopContract contract, TermServices services)
      Parameters:
      variables - variables.
      contract - a loop contract.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a map from every variable that is changed in the block to its anonymization constant.
